'''chasazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crabstick|crabstick]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-s-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crabstick|crabstick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chasazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæsæzhæth|chæsæzhæth]] || [[word:chæsæzhæj|chæsæzhæj]] || [[word:chæsæzhæsh|chæsæzhæsh]] || [[word:chæsæzhæ|chæsæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chasasazhath|chasasazhath]] || [[word:chasasazhaj|chasasazhaj]] || [[word:chasasazhash|chasasazhash]] || [[word:chasasazha|chasasazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chasazhath|chasazhath]] || [[word:chasazhaj|chasazhaj]] || [[word:chasazhash|chasazhash]] || [[word:chasazha|chasazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chasafzhath|chasafzhath]] || [[word:chasafzhaj|chasafzhaj]] || [[word:chasafzhash|chasafzhash]] || [[word:chasafzhaf|chasafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chasazhatha|chasazhatha]] || [[word:chasazhaja|chasazhaja]] || [[word:chasazhasha|chasazhasha]] || [[word:chasazhaka|chasazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chasazhath|chasazhath]] || [[word:chasazhaj|chasazhaj]] || [[word:chasazhash|chasazhash]] || [[word:chasazha|chasazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chasazhathal|chasazhathal]] || [[word:chasazhajal|chasazhajal]] || [[word:chasazhashal|chasazhashal]] || [[word:chasazhakal|chasazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chasazhathatha|chasazhathatha]] || [[word:chasazhajaja|chasazhajaja]] || [[word:chasazhashasha|chasazhashasha]] || [[word:chasazhaka|chasazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chasazhathan|chasazhathan]] || [[word:chasazhajan|chasazhajan]] || [[word:chasazhashan|chasazhashan]] || [[word:chasazhakan|chasazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chasazhathaoro|chasazhathaoro]] || [[word:chasazhajaoro|chasazhajaoro]] || [[word:chasazhashaoro|chasazhashaoro]] || [[word:chasazhakaoro|chasazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
